// 06 · VIRTUAL_IMPLEMENTATION

VIRTUAL
IMPLEMENTATION

Complete Design and Development Documentation.

This phase presents the complete digital implementation of the engineering system, including 2D sketches, CAD models, circuit design, flowchart logic, bill of materials, and final 3D assembly documentation.

// 06.1 · 2D_SKETCHES

2D
SKETCHES

Chassis

Length: 200 mm

Width: 150 mm

Purpose: Main structural frame supporting all components.

Battery Holder

Dimensions: As per CAD design.

Purpose: Secure battery mounting.

Sensor Holder

Dimensions: CAD defined.

Purpose: IR sensor positioning.

Motor Mount

Dimensions: CAD defined.

Purpose: DC motor attachment.

// 06.6 · 3D_ASSEMBLY

3D
ASSEMBLY

Front View

Side View

Top View

Isometric View

Assembly Description

Battery positioned at center for balanced weight distribution.

ESP32 mounted above the chassis platform.

IR sensors mounted at the front for obstacle detection.

Motors fixed on both sides using motor mounts.

Mechanical components assembled to the chassis frame.
